name: Apple Inc.
summary: 硬件生态和服务收入共同驱动，核心变量是 iPhone 周期、服务增长、供应链韧性与 AI 平台节奏。

business.description: Apple 设计、制造并销售 iPhone、Mac、iPad、可穿戴设备、家庭与配件，同时通过 App Store、订阅、广告、云服务、AppleCare、支付与媒体内容获得服务收入。硬件装机量是服务收入和生态粘性的底层资产。

segments.name: iPhone
segments.note: 最大收入来源，换机周期、渠道库存和 Pro 机型组合对毛利有显著影响。
segments.noteZh: 最大收入来源，换机周期、渠道库存和 Pro 机型组合对毛利有显著影响。
segments.noteEn: 最大收入来源，换机周期、渠道库存和 Pro 机型组合对毛利有显著影响。

segments.name: Services
segments.note: 规模仅次于 iPhone，毛利率通常高于硬件，是利润韧性的关键来源。
segments.noteZh: 规模仅次于 iPhone，毛利率通常高于硬件，是利润韧性的关键来源。
segments.noteEn: 规模仅次于 iPhone，毛利率通常高于硬件，是利润韧性的关键来源。

segments.name: Mac
segments.note: 受 Apple silicon 产品周期、企业采购和教育需求影响。
segments.noteZh: 受 Apple silicon 产品周期、企业采购和教育需求影响。
segments.noteEn: 受 Apple silicon 产品周期、企业采购和教育需求影响。

segments.name: Wearables, Home and Accessories
segments.note: 包括 Apple Watch、AirPods、家庭设备和配件，更多体现生态延展。
segments.noteZh: 包括 Apple Watch、AirPods、家庭设备和配件，更多体现生态延展。
segments.noteEn: 包括 Apple Watch、AirPods、家庭设备和配件，更多体现生态延展。

segments.name: iPad
segments.note: 产品更新节奏和教育/企业采购对波动影响较大。
segments.noteZh: 产品更新节奏和教育/企业采购对波动影响较大。
segments.noteEn: 产品更新节奏和教育/企业采购对波动影响较大。

business.thesis: Apple 的核心不是单一硬件销量，而是高端设备装机基数、芯片/系统/服务一体化和渠道控制力。短期关注 iPhone 17 周期和 WWDC26 AI 进展，中期关注服务监管、供应链地域迁移和自研芯片路线。
riskNotes: iPhone 仍贡献约半数年度收入，单一产品周期风险较高。
供应链高度依赖亚洲制造和关键零部件伙伴，地缘、关税和产能扰动会放大库存波动。
App Store、默认搜索、支付和隐私政策面临监管不确定性。

failureConditions.condition: iPhone 仍贡献约半数年度收入，单一产品周期风险较高。
failureConditions.conditionZh: iPhone 仍贡献约半数年度收入，单一产品周期风险较高。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.condition: App Store、默认搜索、支付和隐私政策面临监管不确定性。

supplyChain.thesis: Apple 采用轻资产设计与重度外包制造模式。公司披露其制造主要由外包伙伴完成，地区包括中国大陆、印度、日本、韩国、台湾、越南和美国；进一步上溯后，关键瓶颈集中在先进晶圆制造、显示面板、摄像头、存储、被动元件、电池材料和精密组装。

tiers.title: 品牌、设计、系统集成

entities.name: Apple
entities.relationship: 目标企业本体；负责产品定义、系统软件、芯片设计、渠道和生态分发，外部供应商围绕其硬件路线与产能节奏组织交付。
entities.relationshipZh: 目标企业本体；负责产品定义、系统软件、芯片设计、渠道和生态分发，外部供应商围绕其硬件路线与产能节奏组织交付。
entities.relationshipEn: Apple is tracked in the Brand, design, and system integration layer for Product design, Operating systems, Apple silicon designs. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 目标公司
relationshipStrength.rationale: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The target company itself, used as the reference point for this supply-chain analysis.

tiers.notes: Apple 控制产品定义、系统软件、芯片设计、渠道和生态分发，制造与大量组件采购由供应商网络承担。
tiers.notesZh: Apple 控制产品定义、系统软件、芯片设计、渠道和生态分发，制造与大量组件采购由供应商网络承担。
tiers.notesEn: Apple 控制产品定义、系统软件、芯片设计、渠道和生态分发，制造与大量组件采购由供应商网络承担。

tiers.title: 最终组装与关键模组

entities.name: Hon Hai Precision / Foxconn
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的大型电子制造服务商，承担 iPhone、Mac、iPad 等设备的最终组装、机电整合和全球制造产能调度。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的大型电子制造服务商，承担 iPhone、Mac、iPad 等设备的最终组装、机电整合和全球制造产能调度。
entities.relationshipEn: Hon Hai Precision / Foxconn is tracked in the Final assembly and key modules layer for Finished device assembly, EMS manufacturing, Mechanical integration. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Luxshare Precision
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的连接器、声学、模组和整机制造伙伴；在 Apple 硬件供应链中承担部分装配和组件交付。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的连接器、声学、模组和整机制造伙伴；在 Apple 硬件供应链中承担部分装配和组件交付。
entities.relationshipEn: Luxshare Precision is tracked in the Final assembly and key modules layer for Connectors, Acoustic modules, Device assembly. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Pegatron
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的 EMS/ODM 伙伴，主要关系是消费电子整机装配、主板和系统级制造。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的 EMS/ODM 伙伴，主要关系是消费电子整机装配、主板和系统级制造。
entities.relationshipEn: Pegatron is tracked in the Final assembly and key modules layer for EMS manufacturing, System assembly, Mainboard integration. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Compal
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的 ODM/EMS 伙伴，偏向笔电、平板和可穿戴设备相关的系统制造与装配。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的 ODM/EMS 伙伴，偏向笔电、平板和可穿戴设备相关的系统制造与装配。
entities.relationshipEn: Compal is tracked in the Final assembly and key modules layer for ODM manufacturing, Notebook/tablet assembly, Wearable device manufacturing. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Wistron
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的制造伙伴，历史上参与 iPhone、Mac 或相关硬件装配；关系会随产品线和区域产能调整变化。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的制造伙伴，历史上参与 iPhone、Mac 或相关硬件装配；关系会随产品线和区域产能调整变化。
entities.relationshipEn: Wistron is tracked in the Final assembly and key modules layer for EMS manufacturing, Device assembly, Regional production capacity. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

tiers.notes: Apple 官方供应商名单覆盖组装、机械件、连接器、声学、摄像头和其他模组供应商；不同产品线的直接供应关系会随年份和机型变化。
tiers.notesZh: Apple 官方供应商名单覆盖组装、机械件、连接器、声学、摄像头和其他模组供应商；不同产品线的直接供应关系会随年份和机型变化。
tiers.notesEn: Apple 官方供应商名单覆盖组装、机械件、连接器、声学、摄像头和其他模组供应商；不同产品线的直接供应关系会随年份和机型变化。

tiers.title: 半导体、显示与电池

entities.name: TSMC
entities.relationship: Apple 自研 A/M/S 系列芯片的核心晶圆代工伙伴；关系重点是先进制程产能、良率、封装排产与 Apple silicon 节奏。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 自研 A/M/S 系列芯片的核心晶圆代工伙伴；关系重点是先进制程产能、良率、封装排产与 Apple silicon 节奏。
entities.relationshipEn: TSMC is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for Advanced logic wafers, Apple silicon manufacturing, Foundry services. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Samsung Display
entities.relationship: Apple 高端设备 OLED 显示面板供应链的重要参与者；Samsung Display 本身未单独上市，上市主体为母公司 Samsung Electronics。

listing.note: Samsung Display 为 Samsung Electronics 体系内公司
listing.noteZh: Samsung Display 为 Samsung Electronics 体系内公司
listing.noteEn: Samsung Display 为 Samsung Electronics 体系内公司

entities.relationshipZh: Apple 高端设备 OLED 显示面板供应链的重要参与者；Samsung Display 本身未单独上市，上市主体为母公司 Samsung Electronics。
entities.relationshipEn: Samsung Display is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for OLED panels, Display modules, Panel technology. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: LG Display
entities.relationship: Apple 显示面板供应链参与者，向部分 Apple 设备供应 OLED/LCD 面板或相关显示组件。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 显示面板供应链参与者，向部分 Apple 设备供应 OLED/LCD 面板或相关显示组件。
entities.relationshipEn: LG Display is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for OLED panels, LCD panels, Display components. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Sony Semiconductor Solutions
entities.relationship: Apple 摄像头图像传感器供应链的关键参与者；业务实体属于 Sony Group。

listing.note: Sony Semiconductor Solutions 为 Sony Group 子公司
listing.noteZh: Sony Semiconductor Solutions 为 Sony Group 子公司
listing.noteEn: Sony Semiconductor Solutions 为 Sony Group 子公司

entities.relationshipZh: Apple 摄像头图像传感器供应链的关键参与者；业务实体属于 Sony Group。
entities.relationshipEn: Sony Semiconductor Solutions is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for CMOS image sensors, Camera sensor technology, Imaging components. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Converts chips, networking, cooling, and system design into deliverable systems; strong relevance but usually below manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: Murata
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的电子元件厂，关系主要是 MLCC、射频/连接相关组件和被动元件供应。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的电子元件厂，关系主要是 MLCC、射频/连接相关组件和被动元件供应。
entities.relationshipEn: Murata is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for MLCC, RF components, Passive components. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Converts chips, networking, cooling, and system design into deliverable systems; strong relevance but usually below manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: TDK
entities.relationship: Apple 供应链中的被动元件、电池和磁性/传感类组件供应商之一，影响设备小型化和电源管理。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应链中的被动元件、电池和磁性/传感类组件供应商之一，影响设备小型化和电源管理。
entities.relationshipEn: TDK is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for Passive components, Battery cells/components, Sensors. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

entities.name: Sunwoda
entities.relationship: Apple 供应商名单中的电池供应链参与者，关系主要是消费电子电池、电池模组或相关电源组件。
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 供应商名单中的电池供应链参与者，关系主要是消费电子电池、电池模组或相关电源组件。
entities.relationshipEn: Sunwoda is tracked in the Semiconductors, displays, and batteries layer for Battery cells, Battery packs, Power modules. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 把关键芯片、网络、散热和整机方案转化为可交付系统，相关性强但通常低于制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Converts chips, networking, cooling, and system design into deliverable systems; strong relevance but usually below manufacturing bottlenecks.

tiers.notes: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。
tiers.notesZh: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。
tiers.notesEn: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。

tiers.title: 晶圆、设备、化学品与封装

entities.name: ASML
entities.relationship: 作为 TSMC、Samsung 等先进晶圆厂的上游设备供应商，间接影响 Apple silicon 先进制程产能；不是 Apple 年报逐项披露的直接供应商。
entities.relationshipZh: 作为 TSMC、Samsung 等先进晶圆厂的上游设备供应商，间接影响 Apple silicon 先进制程产能；不是 Apple 年报逐项披露的直接供应商。
entities.relationshipEn: ASML is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for EUV lithography systems, DUV lithography systems, Lithography services. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Applied Materials
entities.relationship: 半导体制造设备上游公司，向 foundry 和存储厂提供沉积、材料工程等设备，间接支撑 Apple 芯片供应链。
entities.relationshipZh: 半导体制造设备上游公司，向 foundry 和存储厂提供沉积、材料工程等设备，间接支撑 Apple 芯片供应链。
entities.relationshipEn: Applied Materials is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for Deposition tools, Materials engineering, Process equipment. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Lam Research
entities.relationship: 向先进晶圆厂提供刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备，是 Apple 芯片上游制造约束中的设备层变量。
entities.relationshipZh: 向先进晶圆厂提供刻蚀、沉积和清洗设备，是 Apple 芯片上游制造约束中的设备层变量。
entities.relationshipEn: Lam Research is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for Etch tools, Deposition tools, Wafer cleaning equipment. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Tokyo Electron
entities.relationship: 晶圆制造设备供应商，面向先进逻辑与存储工艺提供涂布显影、沉积、刻蚀等设备，间接影响 Apple 上游产能。
entities.relationshipZh: 晶圆制造设备供应商，面向先进逻辑与存储工艺提供涂布显影、沉积、刻蚀等设备，间接影响 Apple 上游产能。
entities.relationshipEn: Tokyo Electron is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for Coater/developer tools, Deposition equipment, Etch systems. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: KLA
entities.relationship: 检测和量测设备供应商，帮助先进晶圆厂控制缺陷和良率，是 Apple silicon 上游良率风险的一部分。
entities.relationshipZh: 检测和量测设备供应商，帮助先进晶圆厂控制缺陷和良率，是 Apple silicon 上游良率风险的一部分。
entities.relationshipEn: KLA is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for Inspection tools, Metrology systems, Process control. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Shin-Etsu
entities.relationship: 高纯硅晶圆、光刻胶等半导体材料供应商，处于 Apple 芯片供应链的原材料/耗材上游。
entities.relationshipZh: 高纯硅晶圆、光刻胶等半导体材料供应商，处于 Apple 芯片供应链的原材料/耗材上游。
entities.relationshipEn: Shin-Etsu is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for Silicon wafers, Photoresists, Semiconductor materials. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: SUMCO
entities.relationship: 300mm 硅晶圆供应商，处于 foundry 上游；晶圆质量、交期和产能会间接影响 Apple 芯片供应。
entities.relationshipZh: 300mm 硅晶圆供应商，处于 foundry 上游；晶圆质量、交期和产能会间接影响 Apple 芯片供应。
entities.relationshipEn: SUMCO is tracked in the Wafers, equipment, chemicals, and packaging layer for 300mm silicon wafers, Prime wafers, Epitaxial wafers. Read the relationship together with the confidence level and cited sources.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.notes: 这一级多数不是 Apple 直接披露供应商，而是上游半导体制造的必要投入；用于识别原材料和设备瓶颈。
tiers.titleZh: 晶圆、设备、化学品与封装
tiers.notesZh: 这一级多数不是 Apple 直接披露供应商，而是上游半导体制造的必要投入；用于识别原材料和设备瓶颈。
tiers.notesEn: 这一级多数不是 Apple 直接披露供应商，而是上游半导体制造的必要投入；用于识别原材料和设备瓶颈。

rawMaterials.name: 硅晶圆
rawMaterials.usedIn: Apple silicon、射频、存储与传感器芯片
rawMaterials.risk: 先进制程受晶圆、EUV 设备和代工产能共同约束。
rawMaterials.usedInZh: Apple silicon、射频、存储与传感器芯片
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Apple silicon, RF, memory, and sensor chips
rawMaterials.riskZh: 先进制程受晶圆、EUV 设备和代工产能共同约束。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Advanced nodes are constrained by wafers, EUV equipment, and foundry capacity.

rawMaterials.name: 锂、钴、镍、石墨
rawMaterials.risk: 电池材料受矿产来源、回收比例、合规审计和价格波动影响。
rawMaterials.riskZh: 电池材料受矿产来源、回收比例、合规审计和价格波动影响。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Battery materials are affected by mineral sourcing, recycling ratios, compliance audits, and price volatility.

rawMaterials.name: 稀土、铜、铝、金、锡、钨
rawMaterials.usedIn: 磁体、外壳、连接器、电路板和焊料
rawMaterials.risk: 合规追踪复杂，地缘和冶炼产能会影响交付。
rawMaterials.nameEn: Rare earths, copper, aluminum, gold, tin, and tungsten
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 磁体、外壳、连接器、电路板和焊料
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Magnets, enclosures, connectors, circuit boards, and solder
rawMaterials.riskZh: 合规追踪复杂，地缘和冶炼产能会影响交付。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Compliance tracking is complex, while geopolitics and smelting capacity can affect delivery.

downstream.thesis: Apple is mostly the downstream demand owner rather than a midstream component supplier: its demand chain runs through direct sales, carriers/resellers, enterprise deployment partners, and the App Store/services ecosystem.
downstream.thesisZh: Apple 更接近供应链终端需求方，而不是典型中游零部件供应商：其下游去向主要是直营、运营商/经销商、企业部署伙伴以及 App Store/服务生态。
downstream.thesisEn: Apple is mostly the downstream demand owner rather than a midstream component supplier: its demand chain runs through direct sales, carriers/resellers, enterprise deployment partners, and the App Store/services ecosystem.

tiers.title: Distribution channels and end markets

entities.name: Direct retail, online store and direct sales force
entities.relationship: Apple sells products and some services directly to end customers through its stores, online store and direct sales force.
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 通过 Apple Store、在线商店和直销团队直接向终端客户销售产品及部分服务。
entities.relationshipEn: Apple sells products and some services directly to end customers through its stores, online store and direct sales force.
productsServices: iPhone, Mac, iPad, wearables and services
productsServicesEn: iPhone, Mac, iPad, wearables and services
entities.nameZh: 直营零售、在线商店与直销团队
entities.nameEn: Direct retail, online store and direct sales force

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 终端客户代表需求去向，但通常不直接决定上游产能瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 终端客户代表需求去向，但通常不直接决定上游产能瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: End customers indicate demand direction but usually do not directly determine upstream capacity bottlenecks.

entities.name: Cellular carriers and resellers
entities.relationship: Apple's 10-K identifies third-party cellular network carriers and other resellers as indirect distribution channels for products and certain services.
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 10-K 将第三方蜂窝网络运营商和其他经销商列为产品及部分服务的间接分销渠道。
entities.relationshipEn: Apple's 10-K identifies third-party cellular network carriers and other resellers as indirect distribution channels for products and certain services.

listing.note: 该条是渠道类别，不对应单一上市公司。
listing.noteZh: 该条是渠道类别，不对应单一上市公司。
listing.noteEn: This row is a channel category rather than one listed company.

entities.nameZh: 蜂窝网络运营商和经销商

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

tiers.notes: Apple discloses direct and indirect distribution channels; indirect channels include cellular carriers and resellers.
tiers.notesZh: Apple 披露直营和间接渠道；间接渠道包括蜂窝网络运营商和经销商。
tiers.notesEn: Apple discloses direct and indirect distribution channels; indirect channels include cellular carriers and resellers.

tiers.title: Enterprise platform partners

entities.name: IBM
entities.relationship: Apple and IBM teams work together on enterprise clients and workflows; Apple supplies the device, OS and service layer while IBM contributes industry solutions and deployment services.
entities.relationshipZh: Apple 与 IBM 团队共同服务企业客户和工作流；Apple 提供设备、操作系统和服务层，IBM 提供行业解决方案与部署服务。
entities.relationshipEn: Apple and IBM teams work together on enterprise clients and workflows; Apple supplies the device, OS and service layer while IBM contributes industry solutions and deployment services.
productsServicesZh: iPhone 与 iPad 企业平台

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: Accenture
entities.relationship: Accenture combines digital transformation services with Apple products to help enterprise clients improve customer experience and productivity.
entities.relationshipZh: Accenture 将数字化转型服务与 Apple 产品结合，帮助企业客户改善客户体验和生产力。
entities.relationshipEn: Accenture combines digital transformation services with Apple products to help enterprise clients improve customer experience and productivity.
productsServicesZh: 企业工作流中的 Apple 硬件

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: Salesforce
entities.relationship: Salesforce and Apple position iOS and Apple devices as part of CRM and customer-engagement workflows for business users.
entities.relationshipZh: Salesforce 与 Apple 将 iOS 和 Apple 设备嵌入 CRM 与客户互动工作流，面向企业用户落地。
entities.relationshipEn: Salesforce and Apple position iOS and Apple devices as part of CRM and customer-engagement workflows for business users.

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

tiers.notes: These are ecosystem and route-to-market partners rather than simple purchase customers; they help take Apple devices, OS frameworks and services into enterprise workflows.
tiers.notesZh: 这些更接近生态与商业落地伙伴，而不是简单采购客户；它们帮助 Apple 设备、系统框架和服务进入企业工作流。
tiers.notesEn: These are ecosystem and route-to-market partners rather than simple purchase customers; they help take Apple devices, OS frameworks and services into enterprise workflows.

scarceLayers.name: 半导体、显示与电池
scarceLayers.whyScarce: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: 该层决定高端产品可得性和成本结构。Apple 年报没有逐项确认所有型号供应比例，因此供应商名单与行业公开资料需结合使用。

failureConditions.condition: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The scarcity call should be reduced if capacity additions, substitute supply, or customer qualification progress faster than expected.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor supplier filings, capacity guidance, customer qualification, pricing, and delivery lead times.

highlights.label: Q2 FY2026 diluted EPS
highlights.labelZh: 2026 财年第二财季摊薄 EPS

highlights.label: Q2 FY2026 operating cash flow
highlights.labelZh: 2026 财年第二财季经营现金流

financials.latestPeriodZh: 2026 财年第二财季 / 2025 财年基准

trends.label: Quarterly revenue
trends.note: Q4 values are derived from full-year net sales minus the first three reported quarters.
trends.noteZh: 第四财季数值由全年净销售额减前三个已披露财季推得。
trends.noteEn: Q4 values are derived from full-year net sales minus the first three reported quarters.

trends.label: Quarterly GAAP gross margin
trends.note: Gross margin is gross profit divided by net sales.
trends.noteZh: 毛利率按毛利除以净销售额计算。
trends.noteEn: Gross margin is gross profit divided by net sales.

trends.label: Annual net sales
trends.note: Annual net sales in USD billions.
trends.noteZh: 年度净销售额，单位为十亿美元。
trends.noteEn: Annual net sales in USD billions.

revenueMixHistory.note: Product and service category net sales from Apple Form 10-K.
revenueMixHistory.noteZh: 来自 Apple 10-K 的产品与服务类别净销售额。
revenueMixHistory.noteEn: Product and service category net sales from Apple Form 10-K.

news.title: Apple and Major League Baseball announce July “Friday Night Baseball” schedule
news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: Apple 与美国职业棒球大联盟公布 7 月“Friday Night Baseball”赛程
news.titleEn: Apple and Major League Baseball announce July Friday Night Baseball schedule
news.summaryZh: Apple 与 MLB 公布 7 月 Friday Night Baseball 赛程，属于 Apple TV+ 体育内容与订阅服务生态更新。
news.summaryEn: Apple and MLB announced the July Friday Night Baseball schedule, an update to Apple TV+ sports content and the subscription-services ecosystem.
news.impactZh: 该消息偏服务内容更新，财务影响通常小于硬件周期，但有助于观察 Apple TV+ 内容投入与用户留存。
news.impactEn: This is mainly a services-content update; its financial impact is usually smaller than a hardware cycle but helps track Apple TV+ content investment and retention.

news.title: Mini Football Legends, Family Feud Pocket, and seven more hits join Apple Arcade
news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: Mini Football Legends、Family Feud Pocket 等九款游戏加入 Apple Arcade
news.titleEn: Mini Football Legends, Family Feud Pocket, and seven more games join Apple Arcade
news.summaryZh: Apple Arcade 新增多款游戏，继续扩充订阅内容库并服务于设备生态粘性。
news.summaryEn: Apple Arcade added several games, continuing to expand its subscription content library and support ecosystem stickiness.
news.impactZh: 该消息主要影响服务内容丰富度，对短期业绩影响有限，但与服务收入和用户留存相关。
news.impactEn: The item mainly affects services content breadth; near-term earnings impact is limited but it relates to Services revenue and retention.

news.title: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally
news.impact: 自动抓取条目，需要人工复核业务影响。
news.titleZh: App Store 生态规模达到 1.4 万亿美元，全球开发者持续增长
news.titleEn: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally
news.summaryZh: Apple 强调 App Store 生态交易规模和开发者全球增长，突出服务平台的经济规模。
news.summaryEn: Apple highlighted App Store ecosystem transaction scale and global developer growth, underscoring the economic scale of its services platform.
news.impactZh: 该消息支撑服务平台价值叙事，但也需要继续跟踪 App Store 监管和佣金压力。
news.impactEn: The item supports the services-platform value narrative, while App Store regulation and commission pressure still need monitoring.

news.title: WWDC26 将于 6 月 8 日开幕
news.summary: Apple 公布 WWDC26 日程，Keynote 和 Platforms State of the Union 将展示平台更新、AI 进展和开发者工具。
news.impact: 短期观察点在 AI 功能是否能提升设备换机与服务使用频次。
news.titleZh: WWDC26 将于 6 月 8 日开幕
news.summaryZh: Apple 公布 WWDC26 日程，Keynote 和 Platforms State of the Union 将展示平台更新、AI 进展和开发者工具。
news.summaryEn: Apple announced the WWDC26 schedule; the keynote and Platforms State of the Union will show platform updates, AI progress, and developer tools.
news.impactZh: 短期观察点在 AI 功能是否能提升设备换机与服务使用频次。
news.impactEn: The near-term focus is whether AI features can lift device upgrades and service usage frequency.

news.title: Apple 发布 FY2026 第二财季业绩
news.summary: 季度收入 1112 亿美元，同比增长 17%；摊薄 EPS 为 2.01 美元，同比增长 22%；服务收入再创新高。
news.impact: 业绩显示 iPhone 与服务仍是主线，回购授权和股息提升强化资本回报。
news.titleZh: Apple 发布 2026 财年第二财季业绩
news.summaryZh: 季度收入 1112 亿美元，同比增长 17%；摊薄 EPS 为 2.01 美元，同比增长 22%；服务收入再创新高。
news.summaryEn: Quarterly revenue was $111.2 billion, up 17% year over year; diluted EPS was $2.01, up 22%; Services revenue reached a new record.
news.impactZh: 业绩显示 iPhone 与服务仍是主线，回购授权和股息提升强化资本回报。
news.impactEn: The results show iPhone and Services remain the main drivers, while buybacks and dividend increases reinforce capital returns.

news.title: Apple 提交 FY2025 Form 10-K
news.summary: FY2025 净销售额 4161.61 亿美元，iPhone 和 Services 是主要收入来源。
news.impact: 年报提供业务结构、供应链风险和采购义务基线。
news.titleZh: Apple 提交 2025 财年 Form 10-K
news.summaryZh: FY2025 净销售额 4161.61 亿美元，iPhone 和 Services 是主要收入来源。
news.summaryEn: FY2025 net sales were $416.161 billion, with iPhone and Services as the largest revenue sources.
news.impactZh: 年报提供业务结构、供应链风险和采购义务基线。
news.impactEn: The annual report provides the baseline for business structure, supply-chain risk, and purchase obligations.

themeExposure.theme: 消费电子与 AI 终端
themeExposure.themeZh: 消费电子与 AI 终端
themeExposure.rationale: 公司通过终端硬件、芯片设计和服务生态影响上游需求，但在半导体热潮中通常不如关键制造和材料环节紧密。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 公司通过终端硬件、芯片设计和服务生态影响上游需求，但在半导体热潮中通常不如关键制造和材料环节紧密。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: The company affects upstream demand through devices, chip design, and services, but in a semiconductor boom it is usually less tightly linked than critical manufacturing and materials layers.
